## FallbackRateLimitStorageOptions

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/storage/fallback.ts" sourceLine="13" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Options that control fallback logging/cooldown behavior.

```ts title="Signature"
interface FallbackRateLimitStorageOptions {
    cooldownMs?: number;
}
```

<div className="members-wrapper">

### cooldownMs

<MemberInfo kind="property" type={`number`} default={`30000`}   />

Minimum time between fallback log entries (to avoid log spam).


</div>
